ddls:
CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., stock market, politics, sport) */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_topics" (
  "sub_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtopic */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent topic */,
  "sub_topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtopic */,
  "sub_topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the subtopic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the question */,
  "sub_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subtopic of the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* The text of the question posed by the user */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the question source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_sub_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_topic_id") REFERENCES sub_topics ("sub_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment type */,
  "sentiment_value" TEXT /* Value of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding question in the questions table */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* The text of the answer provided */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment of the answer */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL source of the information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answer_sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the answer being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answer_sentiment_analysis_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, submit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answer_source_link" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the answer being linked */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answer_source_link_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answer_source_link_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id")
)
